description_long: This is a modern, three-seat couch with a minimalist design, featuring a low-profile silhouette and clean lines. The upholstery is a solid, light-colored fabric that covers both the seat and backrest cushions, which are divided into two large sections. The frame is constructed from wood, visible along the base and sides, forming a sturdy sled base that supports the entire structure. The armrests are straight and integrated into the frame, matching the height of the backrest for a uniform appearance. The back of the couch is also framed in wood, providing a continuous visual border around the soft cushions. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, emphasizing a sleek and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, light-colored three-seat couch with a wooden sled base and straight, integrated armrests. The design is minimalist, with divided seat and back cushions and no decorative accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the couch, divided seat and back cushions, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the exposed wooden sled base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden frame and the back of the divided cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and wooden base structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and integrated into the frame, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed wooden sled base running along the sides and back, rectangular in shape, medium height, with a continuous frame design.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, low-profile armrests integrated into the wooden frame, matching the height of the backrest, with no additional padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, divided backrest with two large, attached cushions, continuous in height with the armrests, and no tufting or decorative elements.
